name: Under The Grave
author: Poki
description: Under The Grave is an action-adventure game in which you have to take control of a character that automatically attacks every enemy. You need to survive by overcoming continuous waves of monsters on various dangerous locations. Level up, unlock new abilities and heroes, and try to survive as long as possible! How do I play Under the Grave? Move: WASD, Arrow Keys, or Clicking and dragging with the mouse Pause: Escape Use the mouse to navigate the UI and select or ugprade your abilities! Who created Under the Grave? Under the Grave is created by Fun Kitten. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Under the Grave for free? You can play Under the Grave for free on Poki. Can I play Under the Grave on mobile devices and desktop? Under the Grave can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
